violations.text: The door to the outside, located at the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the back storage area & mop sink area do not have coving, observed exposed sheet rock with holes. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023
Food observed stored on the floor in several areas of the market and in the back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of market shelves and the refrigerator have an accumulation of mold and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023

The floors throughout the facility including the toilet room have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. Fallen food observed beneath many market shelves. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
The area outside the building has an accumulation of litter and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
